reference: Lately, I have noticed that my head has been shaking, and now my husband has asked me about it. Additionally, a customer asked me if I was alright. This is happening more often. I am sixty-one years old. I have had a shaky hand for years, which a doctor once told me was a familial tremor. What should I do?
text: Lately, I have noticed that it has been shaking, and now my husband has asked me about it. Additionally, a customer asked me if I was all right. This is happening more often. I am sixty-one years old. I have had a shaky hand breeze, which a doctor once told me was a familial tremor. What should I do?
